criteria.criterion: DBB-001: grep -i works in pipe stdin mode (execWithStdin)
DBB-002: find /dir returns entries from all subdirectories recursively
DBB-002: find -name glob matches files in nested subdirs
DBB-002: find -type f and -type d filters apply recursively
DBB-002: find results include full paths
DBB-003: rm -r dir/ recursively deletes directory and contents
DBB-003: rm nonexistent returns No such file or directory
DBB-004: resolve does not escape above root
